message:
chore(deps): update Cargo.lock with dependency version bumps

Cargo.lock updated with 254 line additions across multiple transitive
dependencies, reflecting cargo update or new dependency additions from
recent development work. Includes updated versions for crates pulled
in by the network observer's dependency tree.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
